extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER Marc attacked 40km from finish on Col d'Eze/final climbs, overtook YATES Simon for GC by 4 seconds despite starting 37 seconds down.
tactical_patterns: SOLER overcame 37-second GC deficit with 40km attack, proving bonus seconds alone insufficient for yellow jersey defense on short mountain stages.
ISA brothers GIANNI/NIZZOLO coalition targeting YATES yellow jersey backfired when Gianni crashed, dragging brother down and neutralizing team tactics.
DE LA CRUZ David repeated 2017 stage win strategy, using GC rider SOLER's breakaway as launchpad for stage victory.
23-rider select group formed before final climb suggesting insufficient pace from YATES' team to control short 110km race.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: lost 41 seconds and yellow jersey despite having it at race start, unable to respond to ISA/WELLENS coalition attacks on final climb
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: converted 37-second deficit into 4-second victory with sustained 40km effort, showing superior form on consecutive mountain days
rider_signals.GIANNI Davide: negative: crashed on final climb while in attacking coalition, taking brother down and destroying ISA's numerical advantage
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: won Nice stage finish for second consecutive year, demonstrating repeatable pattern of exploiting GC battles
rider_signals.HOULE Hugo: negative: attempted breakaway but suffered weak moment identical to previous day, revealing multi-day fatigue pattern
